fakelib¶

A tiny fake module used by tests.

class Widget() [source] ¶

A widget. Demonstrates a class entry.

Second paragraph with code markup.

read(addr: int, length: int) → bytes [source] ¶

Reads length bytes from addr.

Returns the bytes that were read.

read() ¶

Other read.

log_info(message: str) → None ¶

Log an informational message.
